description.en: A browser-based first/third-person 3D maze game where players navigate procedurally generated mazes across multiple biomes to reach the exit as quickly as possible.
description.zh: 瀏覽器端第一/第三人稱 3D 迷宮遊戲，玩家在程序生成的多樣生態迷宮中奔跑，挑戰最快到達出口的紀錄。

description.en: A React single-page application for aggregating and displaying basketball news with infinite scroll, a rotating breaking news banner, and mobile-responsive design.
description.zh: 基於 React 的單頁應用，整合並提供籃球新聞，支援無限捲動、輪播頭條橫幅與響應式設計。

description.en: A Node.js CLI tool that aggregates basketball news from Twitter, Instagram, Threads, and sports websites using multi-source crawling with scheduled automation.
description.zh: Node.js CLI 工具，從 Twitter、Instagram、Threads 及運動新聞網站多源整合籃球新聞，支援排程自動化爬取。

description.en: A FastAPI backend paired with a Textual TUI that automates monthly staff rotation schedules using constraint-satisfaction optimization (Google OR-Tools CP-SAT).
description.zh: 結合 FastAPI 後端與 Textual TUI 的排班工具，透過 Google OR-Tools CP-SAT 約束求解引擎自動生成每月員工輪班表。

description.en: A lightweight tooltip component library for Svelte using the action directive pattern, with configurable placement, arrow display, and full CSS variable customization.
description.zh: 輕量化 Svelte 提示框元件庫，採用 action directive 模式，支援位置配置、箭頭顯示與完整 CSS 變數自訂。
